title: IndexedDbKeyValueStore
description: KeyValueStore over IndexedDB (via IndexedDbStore), using the **structured-clone** algorithm. Unlike WebStorageStore, values are stored *directly* â€” no `JSON.stringify`. So `Blob`s, `ArrayBuffer`s, typed arrays and nested objects round-trip natively, and there is no string-size ceiling beyond the (large) IndexedDB quota. Use this for binary or large saves; use `WebStorageStore` for small synchronous JSON.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: KeyValueStore over IndexedDB (via IndexedDbStore), using the **structured-clone** algorithm.

Unlike WebStorageStore, values are stored *directly* â€” no `JSON.stringify`. So `Blob`s, `ArrayBuffer`s, typed arrays and nested objects round-trip natively, and there is no string-size ceiling beyond the (large) IndexedDB quota. Use this for binary or large saves; use `WebStorageStore` for small synchronous JSON.

members.name: clear
members.description: Remove every entry owned by this store. Resolves true on success.

members.name: delete
members.description: Remove the entry at key. Resolves true if one existed and was removed.

members.name: destroy
members.description: Synchronously release the underlying database handle.

members.name: get
members.description: Read the value at key, or null when absent.

members.name: has
members.description: Whether an entry exists at key.

members.name: set
members.description: Write value at key, replacing any existing entry.
